title: Anthropic’s Robot Ambition; Nvidia Ramps Up Vera Rubin
summary: But Scoble’s claim also wasn’t totally off base: Anthropic and Physical Intelligence in fact had early acquisition talks this spring, but didn’t end up going further, according to someone who spoke with Physical Intelligence executives.
